vocab.meaning: sự tự ngẫm nghĩ một mình
vocab.example: Even as a child, I cherished moments of solitary introspection, often spending hours reading in a quiet corner.

vocab.meaning: sự cộng hưởng khi làm việc nhóm
vocab.example: I thrived in group projects because I loved the collaborative synergy that came from brainstorming with my peers.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng tinh thần đồng đội/tình bạn thân thiết
vocab.example: Playing team sports like football helped foster a sense of camaraderie that I found deeply rewarding.

vocab.meaning: sự tự do thể hiện bản thân không rào cản
vocab.example: I preferred playing alone with my art supplies as it allowed for completely uninhibited self-expression.

vocab.meaning: sự hòa nhập với cộng đồng/xã hội
vocab.example: My parents encouraged group activities to ensure my social integration and to help me overcome my shyness.
Autonomous play was a cornerstone of my childhood, teaching me how to keep myself entertained without relying on others.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác giữa bạn bè đồng trang lứa
vocab.example: I gravitated towards group games because I valued the dynamic peer-to-peer interaction and the chance to negotiate rules.

vocab.meaning: tính cách hướng nội/thích suy tư
vocab.example: Owing to my introspective temperament, I often found large groups overwhelming and preferred the company of a single close friend.

vocab.meaning: sự hợp tác nhịp nhàng/hòa hợp
vocab.example: Building elaborate sandcastles required harmonious cooperation, which was a highlight of my summer holidays.

vocab.meaning: sự kích thích về trí tuệ
vocab.example: I sought out group chess clubs because the intellectual stimulation of competing against others was exhilarating.
